subject.title: fix(mcp): support image returns in tool results
subject.body:
## background

when an mcp server returns image content via tool results, the ai sdk's `@ai-sdk/mcp` client stores the entire response as raw json instead of converting it to the ai sdk's content types, causing context explosion (200k+ tokens for large images as base64 text) and provider rejection on subsequent requests

## summary

- add `mcpToModelOutput` function to convert mcp content types to ai sdk format
- wire `toModelOutput` property to both `dynamicTool` and `tool` calls in mcp client
- add unit tests for content conversion (text, image, mixed, unknown types, fallbacks)

## related issues

fixes #11072
fixes #12025
subject.extra:
pr summary:
- fixes mcp tool result handling so image content is converted into ai sdk content types instead of raw json blobs
- updates the mcp client implementation, adds focused tests, and includes example coverage
- bug fix centered on the mcp package rather than a new capability

changed files:
- .changeset/red-pens-fetch.md (+5 -0)
- examples/mcp/src/image-content/client.ts (+49 -0)
- examples/mcp/src/image-content/server.mjs (+52 -0)
- packages/mcp/src/tool/mcp-client.test.ts (+345 -0)
- packages/mcp/src/tool/mcp-client.ts (+36 -1)
